title: Different relationships
wikitext:
[]: Different relationships? [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Thu Jul 12, 2007 4:57 pm Will any of the relations/shipping (if there was any to begin with) change in Rebuild? Maybe Asuka won't hate Rei, like in countless Fan-art, or maybe Shinji will dislike Kaworu, like in the manga. Here's my idea, and Evamonkey will probably be the only person to agree... Asuka and Kaworu. Seriously, i think it could work.

[]: Re: Different relationships?             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Jul 12, 2007 5:14 pm Indigo Arcangel wrote: Will any of the relations/shipping (if there was any to begin with) change in Rebuild? Maybe Asuka won't hate Rei, like in countless Fan-art, or maybe Shinji will dislike Kaworu, like in the manga. Here's my idea, and Evamonkey will probably be the only person to agree... Asuka and Kaworu. Seriously, i think it could work.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Thu Jul 12, 2007 5:16 pm I hope there isn't some sort of love triangle. I've seen WAY too many of those.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Jul 12, 2007 5:22 pm :( To sad to bad...in order to keep the new character "important" and "interesting" she/he is going to have to add something new to character interactions...including the dreaded love triangle. The one I mentioned eariler...is the only one I could think of that would interest me in the slightest.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Thu Jul 12, 2007 5:31 pm Personally, I think Rei and Shinji will be the main romantic relationship. The trailer showed Rei with sniper rifle and I think she will be the one who takes Ramiel down. This leaves Shinji to protect her, which could spark love between them. Also, the poster has Shinji saying, "I have nothing worth protecting." It may mean all of Shinji's friends, but it could mean Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 12, 2007 5:33 pm ...Why does there have to be a love triangle for things to be interesting? That wasn't in the case of the Asuka/Shinji/Rei relationship, though Asuka was afraid there was (Case in point: 22'). Jealous Asuka was jealous. Personally, I'd really like to see Asuka & Rei becoming friends like they do in the GoS2 manga (can't say the same happens in the game! :roll: "Laser Eye attacks, bitches!"). And I seriously doubt the new character will be a Children...Even if (s)he is, I doubt they'll be any of that cliched love triangle crap, this is Anno we're talking about; he defies and goes beyond people's expectations! ;)

[]: Re: Different relationships?             Quote Post by TriLink » Thu Jul 12, 2007 5:33 pm Indigo Arcangel wrote: Asuka and Kaworu. Seriously, I think it could work.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 12, 2007 5:39 pm The Goose wrote: This leaves Shinji to protect her, which could spark love between them.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Jul 12, 2007 5:40 pm The Goose wrote: Personally, I think Rei and Shinji will be the main romantic relationship. The trailer showed Rei with sniper rifle and I think she will be the one who takes Ramiel down. This leaves Shinji to protect her, which could spark love between them. Also, the poster has Shinji saying, "I have nothing worth protecting." It may mean all of Shinji's friends, but it could mean Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Thu Jul 12, 2007 5:44 pm Counterpoint: If there was no romantic relationship between R/S in the anime case in point during Operation Yashima as well as before and after that; its not going to happen here. R/S is Sadamoto's manga territory whereas A/S is Anno's anime. Rei and Shinji seem to care for each other because of the familiarity aspect, NOT as anything more. Hell, Rei didn't even realize she cared for Shinji until somebody (Touji, I think) pointed it out!

[]: Re: Different relationships?             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Thu Jul 12, 2007 8:19 pm Indigo Arcangel wrote: Asuka and Kaworu. Seriously, i think it could work.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Jul 12, 2007 8:27 pm Why can't we have a love square instead of a love triangle? Srsly, it could work. Shinji---->Asuka---->Kaworu---->Rei---->Shinji

[]: Re: Different relationships?             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 12, 2007 8:32 pm Themaninblack wrote: I hoping for another female pilot...who is intersted in Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Thu Jul 12, 2007 8:53 pm How could you tell? The guy who saw the trailer in all its non-shitty glory noted that EVA-01 was lying on the ground with the positron rifle. And, as is well-known, EVA-00 gets the Enchanted Shield of Virtue (lol).

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 12, 2007 9:09 pm The Goose wrote: I thought I saw Unit-00's one eye. You could provide a link when he said it?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 12, 2007 9:13 pm When I think about it, there isn't really anything in the manga that would ADD to a character rather than take away from them, with the exception of Kaworu...even the "humanised" Rei of the manga loses more than she gains IMO. Silent mystique sat so much better on her than "OMG hold mai hand Shin-chan."

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Thu Jul 12, 2007 9:14 pm http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=85240#85240

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Jul 12, 2007 9:19 pm Themaninblack wrote: The Goose wrote: Personally, I think Rei and Shinji will be the main romantic relationship. The trailer showed Rei with sniper rifle and I think she will be the one who takes Ramiel down. This leaves Shinji to protect her, which could spark love between them. Also, the poster has Shinji saying, "I have nothing worth protecting." It may mean all of Shinji's friends, but it could mean Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Jul 12, 2007 9:58 pm You know, I don't too much about the whole romance issue. In the original anime there was that sexual tension there between Asuka and Shinji, but it was also kinda there with Rei. SIDENOTE: One of my favorite moments in the series is after Shinji gets off naked Rei in Episode 5, when she has her back turned he feels the fingers of the hand that was on her Breastulars (classic piece of character animation). And the manga was Rei and Shinji. BUT- If I had to push for any kind of relationship forming (sexual or unfulfilled) I'd put ym money on Rei and Shinji. Thematically and cinematically it makes sense. Unlike the TV show which was one continuous narrative that continued week after week, the movies don't have as much liberty in that field I feel. In the TV show Rei and Shinji have their moments and then whamo they bring in Asuka and everything switches. But with the movies we're dealing with a trilogy (4 movies my ass...until 3 and 4 play seperatly it's a trilogy in my eyes). And film one as far as pilots go will be strictly Shinji and Rei centric (unless Kaworu already has an Eva...a pink fru-fru one). So when movie 1 ends those two will have been set on course for whatever relationsjop they'll have. In fact, I'm pushing that Shinji and Rei are the movies two leads and everyone else will be secondary. If these movies are as short as people hint (90 minutes each) that gives a total running time of 270 minutes. Decent, it allows for some character moments but is only about a third as long as the series. If Movie 1 is all about Shinji and Rei than the leads are set in place. The second movie will have to keep those two center field as well as juggle Asuka and the new girl (its obviously gonna be a hot girl). It'd be awkward as far as the film story would go if they just dump the heroine of film 1 for the a character introduced in film 2. In LOTR, Aragon obviosuly should've banged Eowyn but she wasn't around in Film 1 so it was a no go. Remember, Anno and staff said these movies should be accepting for non-Fans of the series as well. Asuka and Shinji seems to be pandering to the fan group. Now if Asuka was in Film 1 than it'd probably be a different story. But I'm putting my money (what little I have) on Rei and Shinji if there is any kind of relationship. On a side note I think people need to pay more attention to Toji. If the BARDIEL incident is still in the movies then that's most likely going to be the climax of Film 2 and if they want it to work emotionally he's gonna have to have more character development than just beating up Shinji in Film 1 and expressing remorse afterwords. I think he'll be more front and center in the movies than he was in the series. Actually, just bet the adults will get the shaft overall. P.S. Its a slow work day so I should be ranting all day long. SQUEE!

[]: Re: Different relationships?             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Fri Jul 13, 2007 12:46 am Indigo Arcangel wrote: Asuka and Kaworu. Seriously, i think it could work.
